new.name: CVE-2026-31156
new.description: There is a path injection vulnerability in OpenPLC-v3, which arises from the program not performing any validity checks on the file path parameters passed in from the command line. Attackers can read any readable file by constructing malicious paths, posing a risk of information leakage.

new.name: CVE-2026-0073-PoC-Exploit
new.description: 🚀 CVE-2026-0073 - Android ADB Wireless Debugging Exploit (CVSS 8.8) 🔓 Zero-click authentication bypass via TLS type confusion. Gain interactive shell, execute commands, scan networks. Educational red-team tool. 🐚⚡

new.name: aegisgraph
new.description: AegisGraph: graph-based application-layer assessment evidence platform for Secure Messaging Applications (SMAs). DARPA ASEMA HR0011SB20254-12 Tier 3 research. ReproChain CVE-2023-4863 reachability + PolyDiff differential parser fuzzing + claim-state governance + reproducible benchmark surface.
